title: Hakodate, Hokkaido — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hakodate, Hokkaido: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hakodate is a city in Hokkaido with a population of 265,000. A historic port city with a stunning night view from Mount Hakodate, fresh seafood, and early Western architecture.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
